title: D4.2.2 - Catalogue of Best Practices to Promote Sustainable Crop Production Systems and Building Blocks for the Institutional-Economic Design of Sustainable Farming Systems
subtitle: WP4.2 – Policy analysis and indicator framework
description: A comprehensive catalogue of policy instruments and incentives for sustainable crop production, synthesising EU regulations and global case studies on nutrient, water, energy and soil management. It reviews command-and-control, market-based and voluntary approaches to inform institutional-economic design of farming systems.
